'''zhangotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yojana|yojana]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-ng-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yojana|yojana]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhangotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhængetheth|zhængetheth]] || [[word:zhængethej|zhængethej]] || [[word:zhængethesh|zhængethesh]] || [[word:zhængethe|zhængethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhangongothoth|zhangongothoth]] || [[word:zhangongothoj|zhangongothoj]] || [[word:zhangongothosh|zhangongothosh]] || [[word:zhangongotho|zhangongotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhangothoth|zhangothoth]] || [[word:zhangothoj|zhangothoj]] || [[word:zhangothosh|zhangothosh]] || [[word:zhangotho|zhangotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhangofthoth|zhangofthoth]] || [[word:zhangofthoj|zhangofthoj]] || [[word:zhangofthosh|zhangofthosh]] || [[word:zhangofthof|zhangofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhangothotho|zhangothotho]] || [[word:zhangothojo|zhangothojo]] || [[word:zhangothosho|zhangothosho]] || [[word:zhangothoko|zhangothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhangothoth|zhangothoth]] || [[word:zhangothoj|zhangothoj]] || [[word:zhangothosh|zhangothosh]] || [[word:zhangotho|zhangotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhangothothol|zhangothothol]] || [[word:zhangothojol|zhangothojol]] || [[word:zhangothoshol|zhangothoshol]] || [[word:zhangothokol|zhangothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhangothothotho|zhangothothotho]] || [[word:zhangothojojo|zhangothojojo]] || [[word:zhangothoshosho|zhangothoshosho]] || [[word:zhangothoko|zhangothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhangothothon|zhangothothon]] || [[word:zhangothojon|zhangothojon]] || [[word:zhangothoshon|zhangothoshon]] || [[word:zhangothokon|zhangothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhangothothoro|zhangothothoro]] || [[word:zhangothojoro|zhangothojoro]] || [[word:zhangothoshoro|zhangothoshoro]] || [[word:zhangothokoro|zhangothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
